3299980.name: Liege of the Labyrinth
3299980.description:
Liege of the Labyrinth is a turn-based roguelike RPG. You are The Guardian, tasked with the destruction of the realm called The Labyrinth by the Gods. Although you are unable to directly intervene, with each run you will start with a randomly generated party.

Your Liber Labyrinthus will collect the knowledge of the friends and foes you've come across in each attempt. Your wits and ability to adapt to the unknown will be your most important tools.

 A LABYRINTH TO EXPLORE  

The Labyrinth is filled with treasures, monsters, and even a few friendly faces. Smart resource management is the key to surviving and conquering The Labyrinth. You can fight or avoid monsters, do you risk the death or injury of a party member for the experience and loot that victory will provide? When meeting with other explorers of this realm, will you trade peacefully with them or take what you want by force or trickery? One thing is certain: the longer you spend on a floor, the risk of more dangerous adversaries grows stronger.

Your only respite will be the mysterious tavern that appears between floors to give you a place to rest, learn new spells, buy items, and recruit new members.

 DEADLY COMBAT

Will you be able to make it though all 20 levels and kill the Liege?

  • Turn-Based: Each turn every character gets Action Points to move, attack, use spells, and special abilties.

  • Resource Management: Hit Points and Willpower will be drained by the rigors of combat and you'll need to balance your offensive with more cautious tatics.

  • Deadly Monsters: Enemies will show you no mercy on the battlefield.

  • Lasting Consequences: When a character is reduced to 0 Hit Points they will probably die, but sometimes will survive while gaining an injury that permanently reduces their effectiveness.
